E

EmailBuilder - Class in com.rays.mail
EmailBuilder is a utility class that constructs HTML email messages for various user-related notifications.
EmailBuilder() - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailBuilder
 
EmailCtl - Class in com.rays.mail
EmailCtl is the controller class for handling email-related operations.
EmailCtl() - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailCtl
 
EmailMessage - Class in com.rays.mail
EmailMessage is a POJO (Plain Old Java Object) class that encapsulates email message details for sending emails through the email service.
EmailMessage() - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailMessage
Default constructor.
EmailMessage(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailMessage
Constructs an EmailMessage with the specified recipient, subject, and message.
EmailServiceImpl - Class in com.rays.mail
EmailServiceImpl is the service implementation class for sending emails.
EmailServiceImpl() - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailServiceImpl
 
EmailServiceInt - Interface in com.rays.mail
EmailServiceInt is the service interface for sending emails.
EmailUtility - Class in com.rays.mail
EmailUtility is a utility class for email-related operations.
EmailUtility() - Constructor for class com.rays.mail.EmailUtility
 
extractLoginId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the login ID from the JWT token.
extractRole(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the user role from the JWT token.
extractUserId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the user ID from the JWT token.
